info.title: WB Gamification API
info.description: Gamification engine REST API for points, badges, levels, leaderboards, challenges, kudos, and more.

points.description: Positive to award, negative to debit. Zero is rejected.

point_type.description: Optional point-type slug. Defaults to the primary type if omitted or unknown.

slug.description: Unique slug — lowercase, alphanumeric + dash + underscore. Immutable after creation.
Unique slug — lowercase, alphanumeric + dash + underscore. Immutable after creation.
Unique slug — lowercase, alphanumeric + dash + underscore. Immutable after creation.
Unique slug — lowercase, alphanumeric + dash + underscore. Immutable after creation.

closes_at.description: UTC timestamp (Y-m-d H:i:s) after which the badge stops awarding. Empty string clears the cutoff.

max_earners.description: Cap on how many members may earn this badge. Null = unlimited.

condition.description: Auto-award rule. Shape: { type: "admin_awarded"|"point_milestone"|"action_count", points?: int, action_id?: string, count?: int }.

max_earners.description: Cap on how many members may earn this badge. Null = unlimited.

condition.description: Auto-award rule. Shape: { type: "admin_awarded"|"point_milestone"|"action_count", points?: int, action_id?: string, count?: int }.

user_id.description: User to award the badge to.

receiver_id.description: User ID of the member receiving kudos. One of receiver_id or recipient_login is required.

recipient_login.description: Login (username) or email of the member receiving kudos. Used by frontend forms where the giver does not know the recipient user_id.

object_id.description: Related object (post ID, comment ID, etc.).

url.description: HTTPS URL to receive event payloads.
HTTPS URL to receive event payloads.
HTTPS URL to receive event payloads.
HTTPS URL to receive event payloads.

target_id.description: Badge ID (for badge_condition) or action ID (for points_multiplier).

rule_config.description: JSON condition/multiplier config. Structure depends on rule_type.

min_points.description: Minimum points required to reach this level.

cookieAuth.description: WordPress REST API nonce for cookie-based auth.
